SessionStart.description: Show working tree on session start

PostToolUse.command: if git rev-parse --git-dir > /dev/null 2>&1 && [ -n "$(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null)" ]; then echo '📌 有未提交的更改'; fi
PostToolUse.description: Warn about uncommitted changes after Bash commands

SessionEnd.command: git status --short 2>/dev/null; echo '---'; git diff --stat 2>/dev/null; echo 'Session ended'
